title: Taiwan Detects 7 Chinese Aircraft and 9 Vessels Around Its Territory
summary: Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense detected seven Chinese military aircraft sorties and nine naval vessels operating around its air defense identification zone (ADIZ) as of 6 a.
contents:
# Taiwan Detects 7 Chinese Aircraft and 9 Vessels Around Its Territory

## Overview
Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense detected seven Chinese military aircraft sorties and nine naval vessels operating around its air defense identification zone (ADIZ) as of 6 a.m. UTC+8 on April 27. Six of the aircraft entered Taiwan's northern and southwestern ADIZ, prompting ongoing monitoring and response by ROC Armed Forces. This follows a larger incursion the previous day with 28 aircraft sorties.

## Reporting Window
- Reported timeframe: 2026-04-27
- Location: Taipei, Taiwan

## Key Details
- Seven PLA aircraft sorties and nine PLAN vessels detected around Taiwan up to 6 a.m. (UTC+8).
- Six sorties crossed into northern and southwestern ADIZ.
- ROC Armed Forces monitored the situation and responded accordingly.
- Preceded by Sunday's detection of 28 aircraft sorties (18 entering ADIZ) and eight vessels.
- Reported via Ministry of National Defense post on X.

## Source Context
The @JASDF_PAO_ENG account on X (Twitter) covers JASDF Public Affairs's subject area as documented in this repository's source manifest. The development above appears in news reporting that aligns with the topical scope this account monitors. Verification stems from the cited publication, not from a direct tweet capture (Twitter API access remained blocked during this collection cycle).
